---
name: Bug report
about: Report a reproducible bug, execution failure, or workflow breakage.
title: "[Bug] "
---

## Summary

Describe the bug in 1-3 sentences.

## What You Expected

What should have happened?

## What Actually Happened

What did the system do instead?

## Evidence

Link or paste the most useful evidence:

- job name or benchmark name
- preview PNG path or screenshot
- review JSON path
- execution warning or error
- bridge or script logs if relevant

## Suspected Owner Layer

If you have a guess, mark one:

- `plannerskills`
- `drawskills`
- `visioskills`
- `learningskills`
- `Setup`
- `docs/contracts`
- `mixed`
- unknown

## Reproduction Context

Include enough context for another contributor to reproduce:

- OS and environment
- config path
- input figure name
- whether this happened in `operation` or `development` mode
- whether this was a tracked benchmark or an external/private job

## Why This Matters

Is this:

- only about one figure
- likely to affect many jobs
- blocking new-agent onboarding
- blocking a specific backend capability
